description: Pre-built component registry for the offline builder's `palette` field. Each entry describes how to reference a component .tox WITHOUT redistributing it (the file loads from the user's own TD install / palette / project at open time via enableexternaltox + externaltox + subcompname) and carries the interface metadata the builder needs to wire it TD-natively: inner root type for the placeholder .n token, inner in-op names/families per input connector (compinputs .network blocks), and inner out-op names per output connector (consumer .n path-form refs like 'name/out1'). Harvested from live TD (wrapper items MUST be live-harvested; offline #1b manifests are only trustworthy for single-COMP-root raw components). Companion to docked_dats.json; PR-reviewable.

derivative.comment: Derivative palette items ship with TD; externaltox is emitted as a parameter EXPRESSION so the path tracks the RUNNING install (machines routinely have several TD versions installed). These .tox are metadata-wrapper shaped: root COMP holds help/icon plus the real component nested under the same name; subcompname loads the inner comp directly and TD retypes the placeholder.

user.comment: User-palette components (My Components). Resolved via TD so OneDrive-redirected Documents folders work; never hardcode a Documents path. Typically raw (non-wrapper): no subcompname.

project.comment: Project-local .tox referenced by a project-relative CONSTANT path (mode 0), keeping the project folder self-contained and portable.

julia.purpose: The Julia COMP is a mapping of the Julia fractal set, more information about the Julia set can be found here.

mandelbrot.purpose: The Mandelbrot COMP is a mapping of the Mandlebrot fractal set, more information about the Mandelbrot set can be found here.

mesh.purpose: The Mesh COMP creates a SOP based on the selected parametric equation in the "shape" parameter.

noise.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:noise.

superFormula.purpose: The superFormula COMP creates a SOP using the 2D and 3D superformula based on equations proposed by Johan Gielis. More information about the superformula equation can be found here.

bloom.purpose: The Bloom COMP is a combination of several image effects that selects and remap the brightest pixels of a TOP. The pixels in the second input TOP are warped around the selection defined by the blur pa

changeColor.purpose: The changeColor COMP selects a color using the RGB values in the “Color to change” parameter and modifies the selected color using the HSV parameter values. The changeColor COMP can output a color cor

changeToColor.purpose: The changeToColor COMP selects a color with the “From Color” parameter and transforms it to the color specified in the “To Color” parameter. The COMP changes the hue, saturation and value of “From Col

colorThreshold.purpose: Modifies a chosen color channel from a TOP by multiplying the original input by an inverse of the selected color channels.

convolve.purpose: The convolve COMP is a simple input interface for the Convolve TOP. The three parameters in "Line 1", "Line 2" and "Line 3" are a convolution matrix which is used to create image effects like sharpen,

dilate.purpose: The Dialate COMP is an example of morphological image processing created with a GLSL TOP. This COMP has two types of processesses dilate and erode. The dialate effect adds pixels to the edge of groups

feedback.purpose: The feedback COMP is an example of the feedback TOP. The feedback COMP is used to create a fake motion blur by not clearing the buffer. For more information see the Feedback TOP. See OP Snippets and t

feedbackEdge.purpose: The Feedback Edge COMP is a feedback image effect created using a Feedback, Blur, Edge, Level and Hsvadj TOPs.

hsvBlur.purpose: The hsvBlur COMP converts a TOP to use the HSV color space then blurs the HSV channels individually.

lightTunnel.purpose: The lightTunnel COMP uses a GLSL Multi TOP to remap and distort the pixels in an input TOP. The lightTunnel selects a circle in the input TOP and extends the color of the edges to stretch across the r

monochrome.purpose: The monochrome COMP converts a TOP to grayscale colors. The intensity of each color channel can be adjusted with the red, blue and green parameters.

pixelate.purpose: The pixelate COMP turns a TOP to a color bitmap by adjust the resolution.

pixelRelocator.purpose: The pixelRelocator COMP repositions the pixels from the first input TOP to a position determined by the second input TOP. The positions are determined by the color channels selected in the Horizontal

pointillize.purpose: The pointillize COMP draws a point at each pixel and colors the point with the corresponding color, creating a pointillism effect.

radialBlur.purpose: The radialBlur COMP blurs a TOP image in a direction specified in the ‘Center Point’ parameter. Using a GLSL TOP the radialBlur copies the image several times and overlays them to create the blur effe

rgbaBlur.purpose: The rgbaBlur COMP blurs the RGBA channels in a TOP individually.

rgbaDelay.purpose: The rgbaDelay uses a cacheselect TOP to cache the RGBA channels separately delaying the movement of the selected channel, requires a movieFilein TOP as an input with a video file selected.

rgbContrast.purpose: Adjust the contrast in the RGB channels separately.

sharpen.purpose: The sharpen COMP uses a Convolve TOP to sharpen an image. The convolve TOP uses kernel processing to perform the sharpen filter. More information about kernel processing can be found on this wikipedia

softenAlpha.purpose: Trims and adjust the edges of a TOP by its alpha channel.

solarize.purpose: The solarize COMP is an image filter, it adjusts and inverts the brightest and darkest parts of the TOP. The solarize effect is also called the ‘The sabattier effect’ more information can be found on

twirl.purpose: The twirl COMP is a image effect created with a GLSL TOP. It warps a TOP image in a swirling pattern originating from a center point.

camSchnappr.purpose: camSchnappr is a interactive mapping application entirely inspired by MAPAMOK, created by Kyle McDonald at the YCAM Interlab. With Kyle publishing the source code for MAPAMOK, we had a chance to look

cornerPinSOP.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:cornerPinSOP.

domeViewer.purpose: A component designed to previsualize dome specific content and / or generate a dome shell (in POPs) to be used to design dome specific content. This is based out of Fred Trétout's (anodin) InsideDome.

kantanMapper.purpose: 簡単 (kantan) - japanese for easy, simple - Kantan Mapper 2 is a new projection mapping and masking toolkit for TouchDesigner. The user defines 2D polygons and bezier outlines in the field of view of a

kantanUVHelper.purpose: The kantanUVHelper is a utility tool to make use of knatanMapper's second UV Map output. The UV map has a texture id encoded in the blue channel and kantanUVHelper uses this to map the right input tex

kinectCalibration.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:kinectCalibration.

projectorBlend.purpose: ProjectorBlend is a tool to smoothly blend projector arrays based on the ofxProjectorBlend add-on by Jeffrey Crouse (ofxProjectorBlend on GitHub)

quadReproject.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:quadReproject. The Extension class of a quadReproject COMP.

stoner.purpose: Stoner is a grid-warping and upscale 'keystoner' tool. It has two levels of warping. First is a 4-point corner-pin. Within that is a mesh warper where for each point of the mesh you can adjust positio

sweetSpot.purpose: This example illustrates the setup of a so-called Trompe l'Oeil effect where you render a scene from the position of the observer and use the result to re-project it onto a surface. Results created fo

pointRender.purpose: Renders a point cloud from the data stored in the input textures. The first input should contain XYZ data stored in the RGB channels with the alpha channel set to one for pixels that contain valid poi

bitwigClipSlot.purpose: The bitwigClipSlot COMP serves as an interface for controlling clip slot playback and receiving playback information of all clip slots for a given track. Users begin by choosing which track they are i

bitwigMain.purpose: The BitwigMain COMP acts as the central communication and information hub for the TDBitwig System. It is responsible for relaying information between the Bitwig controller extension and the TDBitwig s

bitwigNote.purpose: The bitwigNote COMP allows users to read a live stream of note events on a given Bitwig Track. The incoming notes will correspond to the track's note input source, whether it be output from a midi dev

bitwigRemotesDevice.purpose: The bitwigRemotesDevice COMP serves as an interface for accessing and controlling Device Remote Controls in Bitwig. Navigation to controls begins by selecting a track, followed by the device within th

bitwigRemotesProject.purpose: The bitwigRemotesProject COMP serves as an interface for accessing and controlling global Project Remote Controls in Bitwig. Navigation to controls begins by selecting the desired page. The 8 Remote C

bitwigRemotesTrack.purpose: The bitwigRemotesTrack COMP serves as an interface for accessing and controlling Track Remote Controls in Bitwig. Navigation to controls begins by selecting a track, followed by the desired page. The

bitwigSelect.purpose: The bitwigSelect COMP enables users to retrieve channel information from the output CHOP of any Bitwig Component in a project. Component search can be filtered by the Object type, and once the ouput C

bitwigSong.purpose: The bitwigSong COMP acts as a bi-directional interface for Bitwig's global transport; including timing, playback, and recording functionality. It also stores information about scenes and cues, and sup

bitwigTrack.purpose: The BitwigTrack COMP acts as an interface for accessing and controlling the attributes of a given Bitwig Track object. It allows users to choose the specific track they are interested in and perform a

tdBitwigPackage.purpose: The tdbitwigPackage COMP is responsible for updating the tdBitwig Components in a project. When a new version of the TDBitwig System is released, users can import this Component into their TDBitwig pr

synchroCache.purpose: Incoming video frames from the first input are cached and indexed according to the frame index coming in on the second input. The second input expects a single channel of the name "frame_stream". The

synchroFrameIn.purpose: The SynchroFrameIn component performs the client role of the TDSynchro system. It configures to receive the frame index from the SynchroFrameOut module located on the server computer. There is one Syn

synchroFrameOut.purpose: Sends a frame index using a SyncCHOP or a TouchOut CHOP.

synchroNDIIn.purpose: This NDI In component is a wrapper for the NDIIn TOP. It adds features for extracting timecode and conversion to a frame index as well as signal validation and a backup source for cleaner integration

synchroSDIIn.purpose: This SDI In component is a wrapper for the videoDeviceIn TOP. It adds features for extracting timecode and conversion to a frame index as well as signal validation and a backup source for cleaner inte

synchroVideoOut.purpose: Sends out a video stream encoded with a frame index using either SDI or NDI.

TDVR.purpose: The TDVR system is a set of components that together form a toolkit for working with Virtual Reality devices like the Oculus Rift, VIVE and Open VR compliant devices.

recorder.purpose: The recorder component is a wrapper for the moviefileout TOP. Its purpose is to simplify the video recording process as a single component. It is recommended to be used as the recording system in larg

geoPanel.purpose: This example shows you how to put any 2D panels into a 3D scene with lighting and operate them as you would in 2D.

gestureCapture.purpose: The gestureCapture COMP records movement and then displays the curves as (1) rendered lines and/or (2) a dot following the curves and/or (3) free-hand drawn shapes. The outputs of gestureCapture are (

initializeStart.purpose: The initializeStart component is designed to be installed into users components that have time-dependent behavior. If you follow this procedure, you will have a component that has a TouchDesigner-stan

kinectPointcloud.purpose: The kinectPointCloud COMP generates a point cloud using depth textures and color data. The point cloud texture is a 32-bit floating point texture where RGB pixel values are XYZ pixel values relative t

leapPaint.purpose: The leapPaint COMP uses the Leap Motion device and user's hands as a controller to draw in a TOP. There are two API versions for the Leap Motion device, some features are not supported on “Version 4 O

motionSense.purpose: The motionSense COMP detects motion in a TOP texture or a camera device. This COMP outputs a 0 or 1 in a CHOP if there is movement detected.

multiTouch.purpose: This is documentation for the multiTouch component in the TouchDesigner Palette. (See also the MultiTouch page).

pushPins.purpose: The pushPins COMP creates a pushpin effect using a TOP. The pixels in the TOP are converted to geometries in a grid. The height of the geometries are determined by the brightness of the pixels.

puzzle.purpose: The puzzle COMP is an example of Python Extensions in Touchdesigner. A TOP is separated into squares segments and randomized, the user slides the individual pieces to reorganized the TOP. See Extensio

sickEngine.purpose: A sickEngine component launches a SICK TOP in a separate process so that more than one SICK sensor can be used in the same project.

sweetSpotPreviz.purpose: This example illustrates the setup of a so-called Trompe l'Oeil effect where you render a scene from the position of the observer and use the result to re-project it onto a surface. Results created fo

xyScope.purpose: The xyScope COMP is an example of an audio visualization. It uses a CHOPto SOP to create a SOP using the input CHOP channels ‘chan1’ and ‘chan2’ as ‘x’ and ‘y’ positions. Any CHOP with two channels ca

threadManagerClient.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:threadManagerClient. This is the extension of the ThreadManagerClient.

threadsMonitor.purpose: The ThreadsMonitor (Palette > ThreadManager) is a small component creating a UI on top of the Thread Manager and can be used as a live debugging tool. It's useful to track what a TDThread is doing,

arcBallGeometry.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:arcBallGeometry.

audioAnalysis.purpose: A component to analyze an input audio waveform for its properties such as Low-, Mid-, High-Level, Kick and Snare detection, Rythm, Spectral Centroid as well as Slow- and Fast- Spectral Density.

audioSet.purpose: The audioSet COMP is a visualization and modifier of gain in an Audio File In CHOP.

autoMediaPlayer.purpose: The autoMediaPlayer allows for looping over movies and still images in a specified folder on disc in linear or randomized order. There are options to adjust the output resolution, change the length of

battery.purpose: The Battery COMP monitors the battery or power status of your machine. A Perform CHOP is used to get the power status of your machine.

blendModes.purpose: blendModes is a 2-stream video mixer for exploring and using the 45+ blend modes of the Composite TOP. Connect 2 video inputs, select a Mix Mode (Crossfade by default) and use the X or XY crossfader a

callbacksHelper.purpose: The callbacksHelper Component provides an easy setup for Python callbacks on your custom components. It installs and sets up parameters on your component for the CallbacksExt Extension, and provides a

cameraViewport.purpose: The cameraViewport component is a modified Camera COMP that can be used to interactively control a camera's position/rotation in a 3D scene. It can be used instead of the default Camera COMP. Its view

chromaKey.purpose: This helps you build an alpha channel from video with a blue-screen or green-screen (or other) background color by interactively selecting background colors from an image and refining the key. It also

compareComp.purpose: This compares two components. It first identifies nodes that are unique to either of the two components.

cppParsTemplateGen.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:cppParsTemplateGen. The extension class of a CppParsTemplateGen COMP.

customAttributes.purpose: This component helps with adding custom attributes to a SOP via python scripting. It duplicates functionality found in the Point SOP, Vertex SOP and Primitive SOP but can still be helpful when trying

debugControl.purpose: This component facilitates experimentation with and control of the builtin debug statement. It is an operator based interface for the debug module.

firmata.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:firmata.

graphPlot.purpose: graphPlot creates 2D graphs with data points or curves plotted over XY grids with controls over units, ranges, divisions and labels.

imageSearch.purpose: ImageSearch uses the Custom Search interface of Google to find images which match the given search term.

logger.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:logger. The Extension class of a logger COMP.

materialDesignIcons.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:materialDesignIcons.

movieEngine.purpose: The ParCollection class can be used to access parameters. To access a parameter you need to use its internal name, which you can obtain by hovering your mouse over the parameter name, and looking at t

moviePlayer.purpose: The ParCollection class can be used to access parameters. To access a parameter you need to use its internal name, which you can obtain by hovering your mouse over the parameter name, and looking at t

moviePlaylist.purpose: The moviePlaylist is able to loop over images or movies selected via a folder or specified via a Table DAT given as an input. It offers some control over playback, blend- and end- behaviour.

multiLevel.purpose: By clicking and dragging around the UI, multiLevel outputs a single channel of multiple samples, or multiple channels one sample each.

multiMix.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:multiMix.

opBrowser.purpose: The opBrowser Custom Component provides a range of network browsing, viewing, and parameter editing capabilities. It can be used as a standalone browser or embedded into other UI's. All configuration

opticalFlow.purpose: This finds apparent motion and puts the left-right motion in the red channel of the output TOP, and the bottom-top motion in the green channel.

particlesGpu.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:particlesGpu.

probe.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:probe.

remotePanel.purpose: The combination of these two components lets you see and interact with a TouchDesigner panel running on another machine.

sceneChanger.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:sceneChanger.

searchReplace.purpose: The searchReplace Component lets you search and (optionally) replace text in operators. The replace operation is undoable.

sopRender.purpose: sopRender takes a SOP input and renders it with basic lighting and an optional texture map.

splitter.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:splitter. The Extension class of a splitter COMP.

stitcher.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:stitcher.

SVG.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:SVG. The Extension class of a SVG COMP

tdPyEnvManager.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:tdPyEnvManager.

testGrid.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:testGrid.

virtualFile.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:virtualFile.

vstHost.purpose: VSTHost is an experimental component for loading and hosting VST plugins. A VST Host loads VST-plugins, and provides a framework for synchronizing playback, routing MIDI events and audio channel data

waveformMonitor.purpose: The Waveform Monitor displays the color values of each row of the input texture superimposed. For this a pixels color component value is placed on a vertical scale. For example if the red value of a p

webBrowser.purpose: The webBrowser component in the palette is an interactive interface to the Web Render TOP. It is currently available on Windows only, in the Commercial, Educational and Pro versions of TouchDesigner.

operatorPath.purpose: The operatorPath Component is a full-featured UI element for navigating operator paths in TouchDesigner networks.

gal.purpose: gal (Gadget Library) is a collection 11 master components that are simple UI gadgets like sliders, buttons, radios, menus, fields.

lister.purpose: The lister custom Component builds on List COMP to make a multi-featured tool for listing complex data. Formatting of the lister is set up in the config Component, which starts out docked to the liste

UI/operatorPath.purpose: The operatorPath Component is a full-featured UI element for navigating operator paths in TouchDesigner networks.

popDialog.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:popDialog.

popMenu.purpose: The popMenu custom Component builds on Container COMP to make an easy-to-use pop-up menu that can be used as a context menu, in dropdown controls, or for other menu needs. The dialog can be set up usi

treeLister.purpose: The treeLister custom Component provides a powerful and easy way to make tree controls for displaying hierarchical data. It is derived from the lister custom component, so many of its features are doc

signalingClient.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:signalingClient. The extension of the signalingClient COMP.

signalingServer.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:signalingServer. The Extension class of a signalingServer COMP.

webRTC.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:webRTC. The extension of the webRTC COMP.

webRTCPanel.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:webRTCPanel. The extension of the webRTCPanel COMP.

webRTCPanelRcv.purpose: These Extensions reference a specific Palette:webRTCPanelRcv. The extension of the webRTCPanelRcv COMP.
